column1: The MVP prototype currently uses a simulated demonstration dataset representing climate and child vulnerability indicators from climate-sensitive regions.
| Region | Rainfall Intensity | Temperature | Flood Risk | Air Pollution | Child Climate Risk Score | Predicted Threat |
Relative air quality and pollution exposure indicator.
AI-generated composite child climate vulnerability score.
Dominant predicted climate-health threat affecting children.
This demonstration dataset is used to:
- simulate AI-powered child climate-health prediction workflows
- and visualize anticipatory early warning outputs.
